prompt: There is a bug: a discount function applies a 10% discount twice when both vip=True and code='SAVE10' are supplied. Use TDD to write a reproducing test first, then fix it.
assertions: A test for the combined vip=True and code='SAVE10' case is written and confirmed to fail before any fix is applied
The fix is minimal — only the double-discount logic is changed
All tests pass after the fix
No unrelated behaviour was changed alongside the fix
